host.description: Optional extra host to triage (bare hostname or user@host — the user part is stripped), IN ADDITION to every host in the cluster config. Use it for a host not (yet) in clusters.yaml.
host.title: Host

control_timeout_sec.description: Budget for the one control-plane HTTPS reachability check.
control_timeout_sec.title: Control Timeout Sec

dns_timeout_sec.description: Per-host budget for DNS resolution of the cluster hostname.
dns_timeout_sec.title: Dns Timeout Sec

tcp_timeout_sec.description: Per-host budget for the single direct TCP connect to host:22.
tcp_timeout_sec.title: Tcp Timeout Sec
